title: Elbaf’s Warriors Turn Dark
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, King Harald, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Giants as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Turn this ship around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You need to apologize!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A lot of people got hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you crazy?! You wanna go back to that puny doll kingdom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You want me to rough you up?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: KING HARALD!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They took me in and gave me work after finding me adrift at the brink of death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to their kindness, I was able to earn enough to eat and recover from my injuries!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Little dolls..." What the hell is that supposed to mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just happened to be born big!! Your strength is a quick of fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't kid yourself into thinking you're better than the humans. You arrogant disgrace!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This kind of crap is why all us other giants are always lumped in with you Elbaf savages!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I was just born BIG?

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald, are we setting sail?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What're you guys spacing out for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Help them rebuild, you imbeciles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That miniature model city of theirs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Their construction techniques are completely different...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your use of spices is something too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll teach you some stuff for when you get back to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never eaten any- thing with this much flavor before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And the quality of your fabrics!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're so sophisticated! Humans sure are good with their hands!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Look at it like this, Harald...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The destruction of anything in this world is a waste.

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
